comment: Reproducible builds (for now): deno.lock pins every dependency by content hash; that is the real guarantee. esm.sh is not content-stable on bare URLs (this is what broke the deploy build), so where esm.sh honors it we also request the immutable /v135/ build prefix (the *-external preact-render-to-string and twind). esm.sh normalizes preact and @atproto/* back to canonical URLs, so for those the deno.lock hash is the effective pin. @preact/signals* are left as-is: nothing imports them (not in the dependency graph) and esm.sh rejects pinning the scoped-external (*@scope) form. A proper fix (pin/vendor everything) is deferred to the planned refactor.
